task_summaries.task_scope: Quantify cardinality and identify near-constant behavior of bulk features across dataset partitions using evidence refs e23 to e32
Investigate temporal consistency of low diversity patterns in bulk features across time slices within evidence refs e23 to e32
Explore subtle variations within near-constant bulk features to detect any meaningful signal using evidence refs e23 to e32
Assess whether low diversity in bulk features limits or masks relevant attack-related variations and affects discriminative power using evidence refs e23 to e32
